[customizations]

  [[customizations.user]]
    name = "user"
  [customizations.timezone]
    timezone = "UTC"
  [customizations.locale]
  [customizations.firewall]
    [customizations.firewall.services]
  [customizations.services]
  [customizations.disk]
    type = "gpt"
  [customizations.fdo]
    diun_pub_key_insecure = "false"
  [customizations.ignition]

  [[customizations.repositories]]
    id = "one"
    enabled = true
    gpgcheck = true
    repo_gpgcheck = true
    sslverify = true
    install_from = true

  [[customizations.repositories]]
    id = "two"
    gpgcheck = true
    repo_gpgcheck = true
    sslverify = true
    install_from = true
  [customizations.installer]
    [customizations.installer.modules]
  [customizations.rhsm]
    [customizations.rhsm.config]
